headline: REMOTE OR ON-SITE? AUDIT SMARTER
subheading: A QP-grade, risk-based framework for choosing the right GMP audit method every time.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial split-composition pharmaceutical concept visualising the choice between remote and on-site GMP auditing, set against a deep navy background. On one side, a cool teal and cyan glass screen or translucent digital pane floats in mid-air, layered with faint abstract document sheets, a subtle data-trail ribbon and softly glowing audit-trail line graphs rendered as elegant light strokes, evoking distant assessment through a screen. On the other side, a crisp stainless-steel cleanroom corridor and gowning-airlock silhouette dissolve into gentle bokeh, hinting at physical on-site inspection. A delicate balancing-scale motif and a flowing connecting pathway bridge the two halves, symbolising a hybrid, risk-based decision. A subtle fresh-green accent highlights a single decision node where the two worlds meet. Clinical-luxury aesthetic, premium and authoritative, shallow depth of field, soft directional studio lighting, refined glass and metal textures, calm and modern. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
